dataset: GAEC JOULIN farm demo dataset (Charente-Maritime, France)

pi_items.source: Web search for John Deere 6120M specifications - confirmed as real tractor model manufactured by John Deere
Web search for John Deere 6120M pricing shows typical price range $42,500-$184,951 USD; EUR 78,500 (~$85,000 USD) falls within reasonable market range for this tractor model
Web search confirms Ekylibre supports fixed assets with linear (straight-line) depreciation method; verified in task.json and verifier.py that method is checked against 'linear'
Date is in valid ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD); no authoritative source found for why this specific date was chosen for a tractor purchase
7 years is a standard depreciation period for agricultural machinery and tractors in many accounting frameworks; consistent with typical equipment lifespan
Arithmetic verification: 7 years × 12 months/year = 84 months (confirmed via Python calculation)

Web search of French Plan Comptable Général (PCG) confirms 2154 is the account code for fixed assets - specifically industrial equipment/material and tooling; referenced in PlanComptable.com documentation
Web search of French Plan Comptable Général (PCG) confirms 28154 is the accumulated depreciation account for fixed assets (Class 2, depreciation accounts); specifically for depreciation of equipment

Could not find specific reference to account 68112 in French PCG documentation; however, account class 68 in French GAAP is for operating expenses, making 68112 logically consistent as a depreciation expense account

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real French farm data from GAEC JOULIN (Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France). The John Deere 6120M is a real tractor model with market price typically $42,500-$184,951 USD; EUR 78,500 is reasonable. The 7-year depreciation period equals 84 months. French accounting codes 2154 (fixed assets), 28154 (accumulated depreciation), and the linear depreciation method are all verified as real and standard in French GAAP. The task operates within Ekylibre's documented fixed assets management system which supports depreciation calculation and automatic journal entry generation.
